# bytepluscc_id_auth_config (Data Source)

Data Source schema for Byteplus::ID::AuthConfig



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `api_key_auth_configs` (Attributes Set) ApiKey Authentication Configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--api_key_auth_configs))
- `auth_type` (String) Authentication Type. Only Jwt or ApiKey is allowed
- `config_name` (String) Configuration Name
- `created_at` (String) Creation Time
- `description` (String) Configuration Description
- `inbound_auth_config_id` (String) Inbound Authentication Configuration ID
- `instance_id` (String) Bound Instance ID
- `jwt_auth_config` (Attributes) JWT Authentication Configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--jwt_auth_config))
- `trn` (String) Resource TRN
- `updated_at` (String) Update Time

<a id="nestedatt--api_key_auth_configs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `api_key_auth_configs`

Read-Only:

- `api_key` (String) ApiKey Value
- `api_key_metadata` (Attributes Set) ApiKey Metadata (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--api_key_auth_configs--api_key_metadata))
- `api_key_name` (String) ApiKey Name
- `expiry_timestamp` (Number) Expiration Timestamp

<a id="nestedatt--api_key_auth_configs--api_key_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `api_key_auth_configs.api_key_metadata`

Read-Only:

- `location` (String) Parameter Location
- `parameter_name` (String) Parameter Name



<a id="nestedatt--jwt_auth_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `jwt_auth_config`

Read-Only:

- `allowed_audiences` (Set of String) Allowed Audience List
- `allowed_clients` (Set of String) Allowed Client List
- `discovery_url` (String) JWT Discovery URL。
